name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #16
description: Florentine Brainrot #16 is a windows bruise single-panel relic built around Botticelli and Rage Comic Fresco Court. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Due di Spade, used here as the witness card. The Due di Spade motif turns the whole panel into a little court exhibit. The patron calls it taste because fraud sounds expensive. Serial BOTT-16 carries codon marker GATTAAACTACCATATGTGAACTCCTAATT; Gematria marks RIZZ at Σ 474.

attributes.value: a mempool monster with little Renaissance shoes
